scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @onsocial/sdk... run build && pnpm --filter @onsocial/rpc run build
scripts.dev:local-sandbox: PORT=3000 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-local-sandbox NEXT_PUBLIC_NEAR_NETWORK=testnet NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000 NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:4000 BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:4000 next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:testnet: PORT=3000 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-testnet NEXT_PUBLIC_NEAR_NETWORK=testnet NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://testnet.onsocial.id NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://testnet.onsocial.id BACKEND_URL=https://testnet.onsocial.id next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:mainnet: PORT=3001 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-mainnet NEXT_PUBLIC_NEAR_NETWORK=mainnet NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.onsocial.id NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://api.onsocial.id BACKEND_URL=https://api.onsocial.id next dev -p 3001
scripts.dev:both: concurrently -k -n testnet,mainnet -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:testnet" "pnpm run dev:mainnet"
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm type-check && pnpm test && pnpm build
